name: Makosteszta (Poppy-seed Cake)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix flour, baking powder, egg yolks, milk, and a little sugar in a bowl until well combined.
2. Let the dough rest for 30 minutes.
3. Roll out the dough to about half an inch thick on a floured surface.
4. Spread the poppy seeds mixed with cream, sugar, and grated peel evenly over the rolled-out dough.
5. Bake in a moderate oven (325-350°F) until set.
>
